name: Tuscan Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
Note: To make an easy bouquet garni, place herbs on a celery stalk, bend in half and tie together.
1. Soak the beans in water for about 1 hour.
2. In a colander, combine the beans, lentils, and barley. Rinse, drain, and set aside.
3. In a large, heavy pot, combine the oil, onion, carrot, celery, garlic, and bouquet garni. Stir to coat with the oil.
4. Cook over moderate heat until the vegetables are soft, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the bean mixture to coat with oil and cook for 1 minute more.
6. Add the 3 quarts water and stir. Cover and bring to a gentle simmer over moderate heat.
7. Cook until beans are tender, 15 to 45 minutes depending on their freshness. Stir from time to time to ensure the beans do not stick.
8. Remove the bouquet garni, add the parsley, and ladle the soup into soup bowls.
9. Drizzle olive oil into each bowl if desired.
